case_title: HISHAM ZAGHARI VS. RICHARD DEBIE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-09-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-30-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAGHARI, HISHAM AS TO DEFENDANT DEBIE, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 100 INC. PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-22-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ALBERT S. WOOD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-22-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-07-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SARA LERSCHEN, CSR #6213. (212)
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
